🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Strategy's first-ever Bitcoin sale to fund dividends rattled an already-jittery market, dragging BTC below $62K — yet fresh MiCA licenses, a Solana ETF filing and a $19B miner-to-AI pivot kept institutional momentum firmly alive. 🔴 Strategy Sells 3,588 BTC for $216M — Its Largest Sale Ever Michael Saylor's Strategy dramatically accelerated its Bitcoin disposals, offloading 3,588 BTC (~$216M) last week to replenish dollar reserves for preferred-stock dividends. It was the firm's first meaningful sale since building its never-sell identity, and it landed alongside a reported $8.3B Q2 unrealized loss, pushing BTC below $62,000. Read full story 🇪🇺 Ripple Wins Full MiCA Authorization Across Europe Luxembourg's CSSF upgraded Ripple's preliminary crypto-asset provider license to fully compliant, making it one of the few firms fully MiCA-authorized for payments and institutional services across all 30 European Economic Area countries. More details 🏛️ SEC Closes Consensys Ethereum 2.0 Probe Consensys said the SEC has closed its investigation into Ethereum 2.0 without recommending enforcement action, lifting a long-standing regulatory cloud over ETH staking and removing a major overhang for the network. Read more 🚨 Summer.fi Halts Lazy Summer Vaults After $6M Exploit DeFi protocol Summer.fi paused its Lazy Summer vaults following a roughly $6 million exploit, with its SUMR token falling more than 18% in the aftermath as the team assessed the damage. See details 📈 VanEck Files for Spot Solana ETF A VanEck-linked proposal reached the SEC via a Cboe BZX rule filing, formally putting Solana into the U.S. spot ETF conversation and pushing the altcoin fund race beyond Bitcoin and Ethereum. Read full story 🏢 TeraWulf Signs $19B Anthropic Data Center Lease Bitcoin miner TeraWulf's stock surged double digits after signing a 20-year lease with AI firm Anthropic at its Kentucky site — expected to deliver 401 MW of IT load and generate roughly $19 billion in revenue, underscoring the miner-to-AI infrastructure pivot. More details ⚙️ Vitalik Reveals Ethereum's Biggest Rebuild Since The Merge Vitalik Buterin detailed a revised "Lean Ethereum" roadmap that would replace nearly every major part of the protocol, moving quantum resistance and privacy up the priority list. It lands as ether rallies more than 12% over the past wee

75550.subject: Data & Insights: World Cup Dominance, BTC Too
75550.body:
The Data and Insights newsletter brings the highlights of the week from The Block’s Data Dashboard

( https://www.theblock.co/data/crypto-markets/spot )

Gm data enthusiasts! We hope you’ve had an awesome 4th of July and are ready to watch the World Cup round of 16 wrap up. Our team recently published a new report titled " The Cross-Asset Frontier: Tokenized Equities and Stock Trading on Crypto Platforms ( https://www.theblock.co/post/406198/the-cross-asset-frontier-tokenized-equities-and-stock-trading-on-crypto-platforms )." We recommend giving it a check.

This week, we’re taking a look at Bitcoin spot volume and Ethereum ETFs. We’ll also look at RWAs, the World Cup and some more Hyperliquid stats. So grab a drink, take a seat, and let's dive in.

1: BTC Front and Center

( https://www.theblock.co/data/crypto-markets/spot/spot-volume-share-by-asset )

Chart via The Block's Data Dashboard

*Key Insights* provided by The Block Research

* Bitcoin's share of spot trading volume has climbed from roughly 50% in June 2025 to approximately 67% now. ETH and SOL have both ceded share over the same window, with ETH's compression the more pronounced of the two.

* This indicates de-risking within crypto rather than risk-seeking. BTC is the lowest-beta, most liquid asset in the complex. A rising BTC share means capital and trading activity are consolidating around the most defensive exposure vehicle available on-chain, not extending further out the curve into higher-beta assets.
* This is directionally consistent with the ETF-side divergence covered elsewhere this week: ETFs showing real net redemptions. Spot volume share and ETF flows are independent mechanisms; one is trading activity, the other is allocated capital, but both currently point in the same direction.

* Anecdotally, traders have signaled that they are rotating attention and capital toward entirely different narratives, including AI and robotics equities. This lines up with the rather sharp decrease in private market investment in crypto, while investment in AI and robotics seems to have picked up the slack.
* The open question is whether BTC's rising share reflects a durable repricing of risk tolerance across the asset class or a cyclical low in altcoin risk appetite that reverses once volatility compresses. The answer likely depends on whether other chains and protocols can materialize catalysts before broader risk appetite returns.

See the Interactive Chart ( https://www.theblock.co/data/crypto-markets/spot/spot-volume-share-by-asset )

2: ETH AUM Tumble

( https://www.theblock.co/data/etfs/ethereum-etfs/spot-ethereum-etf-aum-daily )

Chart via The Block's Data Dashboard

*Key Insights* provided by The Block Research

* Spot Ethereum ETF AUM has fallen from roughly $16 billion at the start of 2026 to approximately $7 billion, a decline of more than 50% year to date. While part of the decline is explained by Ethereum's -37% performance YTD, the ETFs still

75544.subject: The Wagering Thesis
75544.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/eaa70932-7ce4-467e-b338-a662ed575d6a/0xR_NL_Banner_Heading_Wordmark.jpg?t=1776775276)
Caption: 

Happy Monday! BTC finished slightly ahead of traditional benchmarks, while leadership remained concentrated in revenue and venue-linked baskets. Perps were one of the stronger pockets, with LIT standing out after Robinhood’s Lighter integration and its attached LIT incentive program.

We then look at prediction markets, where June volumes hit another all-time high, and World Cup trading pushed sports further into the center of the category. From there, the focus shifts to fast-resolving live markets and why Pumpcade may be an interesting early bet on that consumer behavior.

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/42e942ec-f31d-4957-8722-a3ac7b121e1e/0xR_NL_Market_Update.png?t=1767631151) [Market Update]
Caption: 

Crypto traded mixed over the past 24 hours, with BTC up 0.83% and modestly ahead of traditional benchmarks, including Nasdaq 100 +0.32%, S&P 500 +0.19%, and gold +0.13%. Leadership was concentrated in monetization and venue-linked baskets, with Buyback Leaders +2.59%, Exchange Tokens +2.58%, Launchpads +1.86%, Perps +1.82% and DeFi +1.65%. Meanwhile, higher-duration and ecosystem beta lagged, with L2s -1.75%, Gaming -1.33%, and Solana Eco -1.26%.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c99f626a-fee1-41e9-b613-41b5a47778c0/image.png?t=1783343837)
Caption: 

Within perps, LIT was the standout, up roughly 12% on the day, driven by Robinhood’s Lighter integration. The key catalyst is distribution and incentives: eligible users in selected jurisdictions can now access Lighter perpetual futures directly inside Robinhood Wallet, while Lighter has committed $11M of LIT rewards to the Robinhood community. Trades through Robinhood Wallet earn 2x points versus 1x on Lighter’s own web app, with those points converting into LIT from the reward pool. Implementation details remain slightly unclear; for example, Lighter still needs to build its own app on Robinhood Chain and long-term fee economics are not fully defined. Nevertheless, the positive read-through is that the perpetuals market — especially as it expands into RWAs — is large enough for more than one scaled player.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/a86393f4-253b-491f-a70e-43662dd55bf8/image.png?t=1783343836)
Caption: 

_— __[Shaunda](https://x.com/shaundadevens)_

———————————————————————————

# The Consumer Wagering Thesis

Notional volumes on prediction markets surged to another all-time high in June, with Kalshi extending its lead over Polymarket de
